mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(a.BBS_ID) FROM bbs_mst a LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT CODE_ID, CODE, CODE_NM FROM code_sub WHERE CODE_ID = 'COM101' AND USE_AT='Y') b ON a.BBS_TY_CODE = b.CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT EMPLYR_ID, USER_NM FROM member_mst) d ON a.FRST_REGISTER_ID = d.EMPLYR_ID WHERE 1=1 AND a.BBS_NM LIKE CONCAT ('%', #{searchWrd},'%')
AND a.BBS_INTRCN LIKE CONCAT ('%', #{searchWrd},'%')

SELECT a.BBS_ID, a.BBS_TY_CODE, b.CODE_NM as BBS_TY_CODE_NM, a.BBS_INTRCN, a.BBS_NM, a.TMPLAT_ID, d.TMPLAT_NM, d.TMPLAT_COURS, a.FILE_ATCH_POSBL_AT, a.ATCH_POSBL_FILE_NUMBER, a.ATCH_POSBL_FILE_SIZE, a.REPLY_POSBL_AT, a.FRST_REGISTER_ID, e.USER_NM as FRST_REGISTER_NM, a.USE_AT, DATE_FORMAT(a.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, '%Y-%m-%d') as FRST_REGIST_PNTTM ,(SELECT IFNULL(USE_AT,'N') FROM COMTNBBSUSE WHERE BBS_ID = #{bbsId} AND TRGET_ID IN (#{uniqId}, 'SYSTEM_DEFAULT_BOARD') ) as AUTH_FLAG FROM bbs_mst a LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT CODE_ID, CODE, CODE_NM FROM code_sub WHERE CODE_ID = 'COM101' AND USE_AT='Y') b ON a.BBS_TY_CODE = b.CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN COMTNTMPLATINFO d ON a.TMPLAT_ID = d.TMPLAT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN COMVNUSERMASTER e ON a.FRST_REGISTER_ID = e.ESNTL_ID WHERE a.BBS_ID = #{bbsId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bbs_mst (BBS_ID, BBS_TY_CODE, BBS_NM, BBS_INTRCN, REPLY_POSBL_AT, FILE_ATCH_POSBL_AT, ATCH_POSBL_FILE_NUMBER, TMPLAT_ID, USE_AT, FRST_REGISTER_ID, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM ) VALUES ( #{bbsId}, #{bbsTyCode}, #{bbsNm}, #{bbsIntrcn}, #{replyPosblAt}, #{fileAtchPosblAt}, #{atchPosblFileNumber}, #{tmplatId}, #{useAt}, #{frstRegisterId}, SYSDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE bbs_mst SET BBS_NM = #{bbsNm}, BBS_INTRCN = #{bbsIntrcn}, BBS_TY_CODE = #{bbsTyCode}, FILE_ATCH_POSBL_AT = #{fileAtchPosblAt}, ATCH_POSBL_FILE_NUMBER = #{atchPosblFileNumber}, TMPLAT_ID = #{tmplatId}, LAST_UPDUSR_ID = #{lastUpdusrId}, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = SYSDATE(), USE_AT = #{useAt} WHERE BBS_ID = #{bbsId}
UPDATE bbs_mst SET USE_AT = 'N', LAST_UPDUSR_ID = #{lastUpdusrId}, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = SYSDATE() WHERE BBS_ID = #{bbsId}
mapper.select: SELECT BBS_ID, BBS_TY_CODE, BBS_NM, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM FROM bbs_mst WHERE USE_AT = 'Y' ORDER BY FRST_REGIST_PNTTM DESC
